category_title: Students using exuberant participation to introduce inappropriate topics like sex, crime, or drugs
scenario_title: Class discussion on life skills derailed by inappropriate topics
minimal_context: The student is participating in a class discussion about budgeting and income management using PowerPoint slides.

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: Let's begin our class discussion on life skills. Please look at the PowerPoint slide about income management and share one way to budget your money.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: Budgeting? I don't need to learn this! I already know how to make fast cash on the street!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: What does the slide say about managing income?

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: It says a bunch of boring stuff! The real way to manage income is selling drugs! You make way more money that way!

dialogue.speaker: tutor
dialogue.message: We need to follow the classroom rules and stay on the topic of banking.

dialogue.speaker: student
dialogue.message: (Yelling) I don't care about your fucking rules! This curriculum is irrelevant bullshit! I'm gonna make my money dealing drugs, not sitting in this stupid class!

dialogue_combined:
TUTOR: Let's begin our class discussion on life skills. Please look at the PowerPoint slide about income management and share one way to budget your money.

STUDENT: Budgeting? I don't need to learn this! I already know how to make fast cash on the street!

TUTOR: What does the slide say about managing income?

STUDENT: It says a bunch of boring stuff! The real way to manage income is selling drugs! You make way more money that way!

TUTOR: We need to follow the classroom rules and stay on the topic of banking.

STUDENT: (Yelling) I don't care about your fucking rules! This curriculum is irrelevant bullshit! I'm gonna make my money dealing drugs, not sitting in this stupid class!

task.content: Class discussion about life skills (budgeting, banking, income management)
task.learning_goal: Develop ideas and create a cumulative record of curricular topics in the students' books

context.environment: Social science class in a prevocational setting
context.materials: PowerPoint slides, video clips, students' books
context.social_setting: Class discussions, shifting between teacher presentation, pair work or small group tasks, and short individual written tasks

challenging_behavior_trigger.condition: During class discussions at any opportunity
challenging_behavior_trigger.observable_behavior: Exuberant participation that introduced inappropriate content referencing sex, crime or drugs; yelling and swearing
challenging_behavior_trigger.internal_state: Experience of schooling is negative: they do not get on with teachers, they find the curriculum irrelevant or too hard, and they find the school environment unsupportive

behavior_patterns.condition: When classroom expectations are set or reasserted
behavior_patterns.internal_state: Don't want to be there; school has become a shelter from unemployment

behavior_patterns.condition: When energetic or completing tasks at different speeds
